allow: Bash(xargs sed -i "s/from-blue-100 via-blue-50 via-white via-blue-50 to-blue-100/from-[#f0f4f8] to-white/g; s/from-blue-100/from-[#f0f4f8]/g; s/via-blue-50 via-white via-blue-50//g; s/to-blue-100/to-white/g; s/bg-blue-REMOVED-//g; s/hover:bg-\\[#003255\\] hover:bg-blue-REMOVED-//g")

Bash(sed -i '1s/^/import type { Metadata } from "next";\\n\\nexport const metadata: Metadata = {\\n  title: "Cancer Types",\\n  description: "Browse 100+ cancer types — learn about symptoms, treatment, causes, and screening for each type.",\\n};\\n\\n/' "app/\(landing\)/\(pages\)/CancerTypes/page.tsx")

Bash(sed -i '1s/^/import type { Metadata } from "next";\\n\\nexport const metadata: Metadata = {\\n  title: "Lung Cancer",\\n  description: "Comprehensive guide to lung cancer — symptoms, types, treatment options, causes, and screening.",\\n};\\n\\n/' "app/\(landing\)/\(pages\)/CancerTypes/Lung/page.tsx")
